item.title: She Got Off the Bus and Vanished
item.description: A disappearance case begins after someone steps off a bus and is never seen again, leading to an investigation filled with unanswered questions. What clues were uncovered along the way?

media:content.media:title: She Got Off the Bus and Vanished
media:content.media:description: A disappearance case begins after someone steps off a bus and is never seen again, leading to an investigation filled with unanswered questions. What clues were uncovered along the way?

item.title: A Warning That Went Unheard
item.description: A true crime case involving missed warning signs and a tragic outcome, focusing on the investigation and key events that followed. What could have changed the outcome if action was taken earlier?

item.title: Mistaking Fiction for Reality
item.description: A surprising situation where misunderstanding and perception lead to confusion about a public figure’s role. What happens when fiction and reality get blurred?

item.title: A Cautionary True Crime Story
item.description: A true crime case involving Micaela Ortega that highlights online safety risks and the investigation that followed. What lessons did this case bring to light?

item.title: Remembering Jennifer Ertman and Elizabeth Peña
item.description: A respectful look back at the case involving Jennifer Ertman and Elizabeth Peña, focusing on their memory and the lasting impact of the tragedy. What lessons did this case leave behind?
